tree.name: Kenrich Williams
tree.tradeDescription: Acquired from New Orleans Pelicans as part of 4-team Jrue Holiday trade. OKC sent Steven Adams to NOP.
tree.note: TCU product, acquired in blockbuster Jrue Holiday deal

assetsGivenUp.name: Steven Adams
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 12th overall by OKC using Toronto's pick, acquired from Houston in James Harden trade (Oct 27, 2012)
assetsGivenUp.note: Pick chain: TOR owned → HOU (Kyle Lowry trade, Jul 2012) → OKC (Harden trade, Oct 2012)

assetsGivenUp.name: James Harden
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 3rd overall by OKC with their own lottery pick. Traded to Houston (Oct 27, 2012) for Kevin Martin, Jeremy Lamb, and draft picks including Steven Adams (#12).
